title: Cannot toggle rollup functionality on required project columns
excerpt: The new functionality for multi-leveled subitems on the updated version of projects has been (mostly) great so far, but one frustrating issue is the limitation toggling “rollup” functionality on certain columns.  If a co…

posts.author: hmagee (Harrison Magee)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new functionality for multi-leveled subitems on the updated version of projects has been (mostly) great so far, but one frustrating issue is the limitation toggling “rollup” functionality on certain columns. If a column (Owner, Status, Timeline) is required, it seems you cannot change the default rollup setting and get this message (timeline example):

image751×254 22.5 KB

I’m not trying to “delete” the column, simply turn on/off the rollup functionality.

Is there a design choice reason that explains why this is not possible, or is it a bug? If the former, what is the explanation for disabling this?

posts.author: hmagee (Harrison Magee)
posts.cookedHtml: What is the relevance of GitHub and PerYourHealth in this context?
